refactoring.description: Rename Variable	base : double to weekBase : double in method public calculateFee(loan Loan, member Member, today LocalDate) : double from class org.library.LateFeeCalculator
Inline Method	public calc2(loan Loan) : double inlined to public sumAll(loan Loan) : double in class org.library.LateFeeCalculator

Merge Conditional	[return 0.0;, if(loan == null)] to return calc1(loan) + (loan == null ? 0.0 : 0.50 * 2.0) + calc3(loan) + helper(0.10); in method public sumAll(loan Loan) : double from class org.library.LateFeeCalculator

Merge Conditional	[return 0.50 * 2.0;, if(loan == null)] to return calc1(loan) + (loan == null ? 0.0 : 0.50 * 2.0) + calc3(loan) + helper(0.10); in method public sumAll(loan Loan) : double from class org.library.LateFeeCalculator
